query: Oui, please go ahead and cancel all of them, même if I do not get a refund for some. I just want to make sure my seats are available for others. Merci beaucoup!

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to cancel all upcoming flights but does not know the reservation numbers.
assistant: The assistant asks for the user ID.
user: The user provides user ID amelia_davis_8890.
tool: The user profile is retrieved, showing multiple upcoming reservations.
assistant: The assistant asks for the cancellation reason.
user: The user says the reason is 'other reasons' and that they want to free the seats for someone else.
tool: The assistant inspects all of the user's upcoming reservations.
assistant: The assistant reports that none of the flights have been flown yet, summarizes which reservations have travel insurance, and explains that refund eligibility will vary. It asks whether the user wants to proceed with canceling all listed reservations.

candidate_answers.text: Understood. I’ll proceed with canceling all of those upcoming reservations, even though some may not be refundable.
The user has explicitly authorized cancellation of every listed upcoming reservation despite mixed refund eligibility, so the grounded next step is to execute the cancellations.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the user's global cancellation authorization turn because all target reservations have been surfaced and the user now clearly instructs the assistant to cancel every one of them despite uneven refund outcomes.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message
history_summary stops before the assistant's later final yes/no prompt and before the batch cancellation tool calls
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
edge case: this turn authorizes a batch of cancellations across multiple reservations rather than a single booking
